title: Sqlitelogictest: algebra join between lng and int BATs undefined
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab1(col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 REAL, col3 TEXT);
CREATE TABLE tab2(col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 INTEGER, col3 INTEGER DEFAULT 1);
SELECT * FROM tab1 WHERE col2 NOT IN (SELECT col1 FROM tab2 WHERE col3 IS NOT NULL) AND col0 < 5;
key_bug_features: Algebra join between lng and int BATs
